t-1.notes: feature: ship lifecycle · Ship @ internal/cmd/ship.go · commits its post-push state.json write so ship returns on a clean working tree

t-2.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · phaseComplete @ internal/cmd/phase.go · deletes the remote phase branch idempotently via ls-remote-guarded push --delete

t-3.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · TestShipToCompleteLeavesZeroManualGit @ internal/cmd/phase_test.go · end-to-end ship→squash→complete leaves clean tree, no local/remote phase branch, in both provider-delete cases
